title: Hermitcrack Server Modpack
description: a small modpack for the hermitcrack minecraft server
body:
The official modpack for the Hermitcrack Minecraft server. This lightweight pack focuses on performance and visual improvements, including mild optimization mods, optional shaders, curated resource packs, and essential quality-of-life features.

Designed to enhance gameplay while staying close to vanilla and ensuring full compatibility with the server.
